Component Library

50+ production-ready components with full accessibility support

Button System

9 variants, 4 sizes, disabled & loading states

Form Controls

Complete form system with validation states

Basic Inputs

We'll never share your email

Validation States

✓ Email is valid
✗ Please enter a valid email

Input Sizes & Groups

@

Select & Checkboxes

Card Components

5 card styles with header, body, and footer slots

Default Card

Standard card with shadow and border. Perfect for general content.

Elevated Card

More prominent shadow that elevates on hover. Great for featured content.

Interactive Card

Clickable card with hover effects. Use for clickable content blocks.

Outlined Card

Transparent background with border. Good for subtle content separation.

Flat Card

No shadow, just border. Use when you want minimal visual hierarchy.

Card with Header & Footer

Active

This card demonstrates the header and footer slots. You can combine any card style with these structural elements.

Alert Components

Feedback messages with semantic colors

ℹ️
Information

This is an informational message.

✓
Success

Your changes have been saved successfully!

⚠️
Warning

Your subscription expires in 3 days.

✕
Error

Failed to save changes. Please try again.

Complete Card Structure

Using all card sub-components

Archived

This demonstrates the complete card structure with header, body, and footer. The card-title, card-subtitle, and card-text classes provide consistent typography.
